from core.comments import strip_comments

# Test 1: Block comment removal (from test)
result1 = strip_comments('a /* drop me */ b')
print(f'Test 1 (block comment): \"{result1}\" == \"a  b\": {result1 == \"a  b\"}')

# Test 2: Line comment removal (existing behavior)
result2 = strip_comments('code # comment')
print(f'Test 2 (line comment): \"{result2}\" == \"code \": {result2 == \"code \"}')

print(f'Test 3 (mixed): \"{result3}\" == \"a  b \": {result3 == \"a  b \"}')

result4 = strip_comments('a /* comment1 */ b /* comment2 */ c')
